overview: SHUBH SCHOOL ERP is a comprehensive, modular School Management system for Indian schools. It is a fully online, mobile-optimized Progressive Web App covering all standard school management needs: Students, Fees, Attendance, HR/Payroll, Examinations, Transport, Library, Inventory, Communication, and 15+ more modules. Designed for cPanel/MySQL shared hosting with LiteSpeed web server compatibility.
features: Multi-role login (Super Admin, Admin, Teacher, Accountant, Parent, Student, Driver)
Students with Excel-style grid, bulk import, and family grouping
Fee collection with QR receipts, balance auto-carry, and monthly chart
Attendance with RFID/QR, AI face recognition, and biometric sync
Examinations with drag-and-drop result designer and WhatsApp broadcast
HR/Payroll with staff directory and payslip generation
Transport with routes, pickup points, and GPS tracking
Communication with WhatsApp integration and notification scheduler
10 color themes, dark navy sidebar, PWA installable on phone
All data saves directly to MySQL — no offline sync, ultra-fast
